message:
✨ Sidebar UX improvements: move KubeStellar to Legacy, polish styling (#1240)

- Move KubeStellar from primary projects to Legacy section
- KubeStellar Console and MCP are now the primary top-level sections
- Add vertical spacing between sidebar sections for better readability
- Refine typography: 13px text, tighter padding, truncated labels
- Professional hover states with subtle bg highlights
- Smaller chevron icons, muted colors for inactive items
- Active items use blue-600/blue-50 for clearer visual hierarchy
- Softer box shadow on sidebar container
- Default fallback project changed to Console

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
